release_notes:
Version 2.7.12 - Feed Interaction Optimization (Fast-Skip)
✨ New Features & Fixes:
- Core: Optimized Feed Interaction logic for Facebook and Instagram (Fast-Skip strategy).
- Core: The bot now automatically skips the feed if no interactable posts are found after 2-3 attempts.
- UI: Improved real-time feedback and logging for transitions between feed tasks and scheduled actions.
- Stability: Prevents unnecessary scrolling when the feed is empty or unresponsive.
